arts.ttl: Arne Slot responds to Mo Salah comments over Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Arne Slot does not believe Mo Salah’s comments over his contract situation at Liverpool are a distraction as they prepare to face Real Madrid in the Uefa Champions League.
